testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Login Page Scenarios allows login with valid credentials
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Login Page Scenarios shows error when password is wrong
testcase.classname: shows error when password is wrong

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Login Page Scenarios shows message for non-existing user
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Login Page Scenarios shows required-field errors on empty login form
testcase.classname: shows required-field errors on empty login form

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Login Page Scenarios shows invalid email format message on login
testcase.classname: shows invalid email format message on login

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Signup Page Scenarios registers a user with valid data
testcase.classname: registers a user with valid data

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Signup Page Scenarios shows errors for missing fields
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Signup Page Scenarios shows error for short password
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Signup Page Scenarios shows error for invalid email
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Signup Page Scenarios shows error for short username
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios rejects random invalid email inputs
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios accepts boundary username length of 3 characters
testcase.classname: accepts boundary username length of 3 characters

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios accepts boundary password length of 6 characters
testcase.classname: accepts boundary password length of 6 characters

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios rejects special characters in username
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios normalizes email casing and allows login
testcase.classname: normalizes email casing and allows login

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios handles rapid multiple submissions by rejecting duplicate email
testcase.classname: handles rapid multiple submissions by rejecting duplicate email

testcase.name: Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios rejects username longer than 30 characters
Auth Integration Tests (POM) Advanced Interaction Scenarios rejects password containing spaces
Validation Logic Unit Tests Email Validation accepts valid email format
Validation Logic Unit Tests Email Validation rejects missing @ symbol
Validation Logic Unit Tests Email Validation rejects missing domain
Validation Logic Unit Tests Email Validation rejects empty email
Validation Logic Unit Tests Password Validation accepts password with 6 or more characters
testcase.classname: accepts password with 6 or more characters

testcase.name: Validation Logic Unit Tests Password Validation rejects short password
Validation Logic Unit Tests Username Validation accepts username with 3 or more characters
testcase.classname: accepts username with 3 or more characters

testcase.name: Validation Logic Unit Tests Username Validation rejects username shorter than 3 chars
